narrative:
Troy East (precinct in Athens County) has 779 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
